doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The State Bar of California has no such protocol, and the provisions directly contradict current California Business & Professions Code requirements regarding attorney supervision of paralegals.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: The State Bar of California has not authorized paralegals to draft motions without pre-filing attorney supervision, nor does this specific protocol exist in current or proposed California law.
response_turn2:
